a3d7e9af1.title: New Server Hopes to Break Through AI’s “Memory Wall”
a3d7e9af1.body:
Memory is arguably the most serious constraint on modern AI large language models (LLMs). According to one influential paper , LLM token generation is an inherently memory-bound task, meaning the rate at which models output text is limited by how quickly data can be read in from memory. ad01feb8a.title: Reward Hacking in Reinforcement Learning
ad01feb8a.body:
Reward hacking occurs when a reinforcement learning (RL) agent exploits flaws or ambiguities in the reward function to achieve high rewards, without genuinely learning or completing the intended task.
